title: Modify the pod name suffix '_pod' to '-pod'

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *aonoa*, *flouthoc*, *mheon*, *zhangguanzhang* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc,mheon,zhangguanzhang] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Thanks @aonoa 
Putting the new book `Podman in Action` to good use, finding bugs.

> Please update the `Signed-off-by` line in the commit message to include your real name. The guidelines do not allow pseudonyms (see https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs).

My comment remained unaddressed.

> > 请更新`Signed-off-by`提交消息中的行以包含您的真实姓名。该指南不允许使用假名（请参阅https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs）。
> 
> 我的评论仍未得到解决。

I've revised it.This is the Pinyin of my Chinese name
Apologies, I was unaware. Thank you!
